properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You paint a rainbow against the grey skies You raise all life of every kind You open the window to pour down rain into the ground You spring up fountain to sustain our lives

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You make the Earth breathe every morning You fill the air with birds and butterflies You let the cool breeze to refresh all creation You turn the darkness into light

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praise, praise to Your name Praise, praise above all things Praise, praise to Your name Praise, praise Jehovah, our King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You move the mountains and the oceans, You light the moon and stars every night, You made Heaven and Earth in Your Own purpose, You bless Your people in different ways.
